dialogos.texto_en: Oooohhhh!\nAs expected, the sea in Okinawa is so beautiful!!
White sandy beaches, the emerald green sea,\nand the shining sun!
You absolutely can't say you came to Okinawa \nwithout enjoying this!
Yeah, that's for sure!\nIt's a shame we didn't come to the beach until today.
Isn't the ocean what Okinawa is all about?
Timing-wise, it seems there are fewer tourists around,\nwhich is helpful. This way, it won't be like yesterday.
Well, we should still be careful.\nWe don't want to ruin our fun time at the beach.
Yes, let's use caution.
By the way, Uesugi-kun?\nYou're not satisfied just by looking at the sea,\nare you?
The real deal starts now, right?\nShall we go for a swim right away?
No, no, we haven't prepared anything yet.\nLet's change into our swimsuits first...
We're not swimming here, you know?
Huh? What do you mean?
We pre-booked a trial diving session.
If we go out now, we'll be back around lunchtime.\nIt seems perfect, doesn't it?
No way!!\nI thought we were just going to play at the beach,\nI never expected diving!
Ah, but if you don't wanna try that, Uesugi-kun,\nwe can cancel and switch to something else?
What are you talking about?\nOf course we're going to do something that cool!!
(After trying the trial diving, we rented a tour boat\n and moved to a diving spot.)
(There, while receiving guidance from the instructor,\n we thoroughly enjoyed exploring under the sea\n with beautiful fish and stunning coral.)
(By the time we returned from indulging in\n the underwater world and came back to the beach,\n it was already past noon%p-2;――%p;)
Wow!\nThat was really fun,\nplaying with the fish and everything!
The coral reef was beautiful too...\nChoosing diving was definitely the right decision.
Above all, I feel like we really enjoyed the true Okinawa.
It was a little scary at first, though...
Since we practiced so hard,\nI also wanted to go to the Blue Cave or something.
Anyway, Uesugi-kun, aren't you a little slow?\nHow long does it take you to change clothes?
Ah, sorry for making you wait.
You're so slow.\nI was tired of waiting%p-2;――
Aahh...
Ahaha...\nIt seems like your stomach couldn't wait, huh?
H-hey! Stop teasing me, Ichika!
WOAH?!
If you exercise that much, you're bound to get hungry.\nAlright, let's go for a barbecue right away!
Y-yes, that's right!\nWe've already signed up for the hotel plan,\nso everything should be ready.
As expected, you're efficient when it comes to food.
Oh, you... Making reservations and efficiency\nhave no such relationship.
If you call people by their names, Itsuki,\nwe'll get caught, you know?
I'm sorry...
But, Futaro didn't mind at all.\nDid he not hear me?
I don't think he did.
However, if it's going to be five Itsuki-sized servings,\nwe'll need to prepare\nfor around twenty people, won't we?
W-what are you saying!\nEven I couldn't eat that much!
That's right. That's going a bit overboard, isn't it?
Hahaha! Obviously, that was a joke.\nDon't get so angry.
However, I'm really hungry today!\nI'll eat even more than Itsuki!
Your rudeness just has no limit, doesn't it?
...Come to think of it,\nthis isn't something we need to worry about, is it?
Yeah.\nIt depends on Futaro.
Woah!\nEverything's already prepared!
There's plenty of meat, seafood, and vegetables!
The ingredients are already prepared too. \nWe can cook them immediately.
Cooking?\nIsn't barbecuing just a matter of grilling?
Well, that's all well and good, \nbut we have all these ingredients,\nright?
We might as well make it delicious!
That's a good point.
But, cooking...
What is it?
If we cook, you might notice who we are\nbased on how good or bad someone is.
Ah, that's true. But if no one cooks...
Heh!\nObviously, I'll do it.\nThis time%p-2;――
Leave things to me!
Huh?
A-are you alright?
Just grill the prepared ingredients, right?\nYou don't have to worry so much about it.
Well, the prep work is already done but...
Hey, just watch me, alright?!\n%p-2;――%p; Voila!
Oh no, it's burning...
Hmm, is the heat too strong?\nWell, whatever, don't worry about a little burn!\nThat's what makes it a barbecue, right?
Ahh, oh NO! I can't just watch this!
Nah, come on, let me go a little more!\nWait a little longer, it's almost ready!
Hahaha, how's that!\nI've perfectly grilled everyone's portion!
Alright, don't be shy!\nEat to your heart's desire!
...It's still burnt though.
Well, it's natural for it to burn like that.\nAll he did was cook it over high heat, right?
It's not that bad, is it?\nInstead of saying burnt, say it's nice and crispy!
Nom nom...\nApart from being burnt, it tastes quite good.
The seasoning was done properly too,\nregardless of its appearance.
Besides, they say hunger is the best seasoning.
Geez, you're harsh.\nBut, this will still be a good memory, right?
I've never cooked for you guys before, have I?
Really? What about the time\nwe ate on the island last summer?
Oh, right. Well, that was an emergency situation,\nand I just assisted with the cooking, didn't I?
True. If you look at it that way,\nthis could be the first time.
So, we've got one more memory to add to the list.
That's right, savor it properly, okay?
Even though it's just grilled food.
It does taste good,\nbut it's mostly thanks to the original seasoning\nand the quality of the ingredients.
Y-you're merciless...
Teehee!\nWell then, let's cook the remaining ingredients now.
Please don't watch who's cooking, okay?
I know, I know.\nAlright, I'll leave it to you then.
Sorry to keep you waiting.
Ohhh...\nThe table suddenly looks luxurious.\nIt's like a small restaurant, isn't it?
It all looks so delicious!
What's...this?
That's called 'ajillo.'\nI added a little something to the seasoning\nsince there were many spices available.
Ajillo...?
Umm, to put it simply,\nit's a dish cooked with olive oil and garlic.\nIt's really delicious.
And here we have...\noh my, it's a baked dish of warm vegetables\nand salmon in foil!
If I were to make something like this,\nI would just be in the position of grilling it...
Let's give Uesugi-kun some credit for his effort.
He might be the type to thrive on praise.
What do you think?\nIs he the type to get carried away?
Hey, you guys.\nSay those kind of things where I can't hear you.
Heheh, sorry.
Well then, let's dig in. The food will get cold.
Come on...
(In the end, this is what it is.)
(Being with all of them is fun.\n I want to do things that I can only do now,\n together with them.)
(If we could stay in this same relationship forever, \n the six of us%p-2;――%p;)
(...I won't choose anyone.)
(That was my first choice.)
(Yet, I realized it was a mistake.)
(Therefore, I can't afford to make that mistake again.)
(Today, I will give those five the answer\n I couldn't give them on that day.)
(...That is, the proof of the bond\n between us.)
(...That is, the proof of the bond\n between us.)
